description_long: This is a small potted plant featuring a reddish-brown terracotta-style pot filled with soil. The plant itself has a slender, upright stem with several broad, green leaves that display prominent white veins. Scattered among the leaves are small, round, orange-red fruits or berries, adding a pop of color to the foliage. The pot is simple and unadorned, with a slightly flared rim and a matte finish. A rectangular plant identification label is visible, inserted into the soil near the base of the stem. The overall appearance suggests a decorative plant suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments.
description: A small potted plant with broad green leaves, orange-red berries, and a plain reddish-brown terracotta-style pot. A plant label is visible in the soil.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plant's main stem, several leaves, orange-red berries, and the plant label partially visible in the soil.
description_view_1: Side view with the plant label clearly visible, more leaves and berries are seen from this angle.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back leaves and berries, with the plant label less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plant's foliage and berries, with the label mostly obscured by leaves.
attribute_plant_species: fruiting shrub (possibly Solanum or ornamental pepper)
